summary: Iteration 138: Tested POS categories auto-include, printer CRUD, and SizesEditor with branch pricing. All tests PASSED.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/cashier/categories correctly returns 7 default categories with required fields (id, name, icon, color, display_order)
Backend printer CRUD endpoints working correctly: GET/POST/PUT/DELETE at /api/cashier/printers
Printer test endpoint /api/cashier/printers/{id}/test returns status 'ok' as expected
Frontend POS page correctly displays all category tabs (All Items, Popular, Main Dishes, Appetizers, Beverages, Desserts, Sides)
Frontend Printer Settings dialog properly shows form fields and configured printers list
Frontend SizesEditor shows 'Branch Availability & Pricing' section for each size with checkboxes for each branch
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test printers during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 138: All features verified working. POS categories endpoint returns 7 defaults. Printer CRUD fully functional. SizesEditor shows branch checkboxes with custom pricing inputs per branch. Existing test printer 'Receipt Printer 1' remains in system. Menu items have sizes with Regular/Large options showing branch availability sections.
